title: Ceramic Blue Tile
longDescription: This premium ceramic tile features a smooth blue glaze finish that brings a calm and elegant atmosphere to any interior space. It is made from high-quality ceramic material, ensuring long-lasting durability and resistance to scratches and moisture. Perfect for both wall and floor applications in kitchens, bathrooms, and living areas. Its modern aesthetic blends well with contemporary and minimalist design styles.

title: Marble White Tile
longDescription: This elegant white marble tile is designed to replicate the natural beauty of real marble while offering enhanced durability and easier maintenance. It features a polished surface that reflects light beautifully, creating a luxurious feel in any room.

title: Wood Texture Tile
longDescription: This wood texture ceramic tile mimics natural wood while offering durability and water resistance. Perfect for creating warm interior environments like living rooms and cafés.

title: Black Matte Tile
longDescription: A stylish black matte porcelain tile designed for luxury interiors. It is highly durable, modern and suitable for premium architectural designs.

title: Glossy Grey Tile
description: Stylish glossy grey tile for floor and wall use

title: Stone Finish Tile
description: Rough stone texture tile for natural look interiors

title: Beige Sand Tile
description: Soft beige sand color tile for calm interior design

title: Patterned Moroccan Tile
description: Colorful Moroccan style decorative pattern tile

title: Glossy White Tile
description: Bright glossy white tile for modern clean look

title: Granite Dark Tile
description: Durable dark granite finish tile for luxury flooring
